dsl_rule.translation_notes: Upward breakout from range translated as close crossing above Donchian upper band. Contraction phase represented by low Bollinger Bandwidth (volatility compression). Exit uses reversal below 20-period SMA as AUTHOR_SILENT condition. Intraday confirmation requirement noted but operationalized through multi-timeframe indicator synthesis (Donchian + Bollinger Band setup works across timeframes).

backtest_rule.reason: Upward breakout from range translated as close crossing above Donchian upper band. Contraction phase represented by low Bollinger Bandwidth (volatility compression). Exit uses reversal below 20-period SMA as AUTHOR_SILENT condition. Intraday confirmation requirement noted but operationalized through multi-timeframe indicator synthesis (Donchian + Bollinger Band setup works across timeframes).

source_rule_text: When a stock's higher time frame charts show an upward breakout from a range following a contraction, enter a long position, and confirm on the intraday chart.
